channel.title: Adventuring Academy
channel.description: Latest releases from Adventuring Academy on Dropout.tv

item.title: Hindsight Is Rose-Colored Glasses (with Izzy Roland)
item.description:
Izzy Roland joins Brennan to discuss her D&D origins, romance in TTRPG, and The Real Housewives.

Duration: 1:40:31

Tags: Adventuring Academy, interviews, q and a, RPG, NPC, game masters, dungeons and dragons, role playing, tabletop rpg, brennan lee mulligan, izzy roland

item.title: Adventuring Academy Season 6 Trailer
item.description:
The only show that honors the bravery of snacking and discussing D&D is back! New season April 29th.

Duration: 01:50

Tags: Adventuring Academy, interviews, q and a, RPG, NPC, game masters, dungeons and dragons, role playing, tabletop rpg, brennan lee mulligan
